name: God's Gear (RPG)
description:
Pic link: https://www.pinterest.com/pin/101260691617610304/

=======================================

Summary:

50 years ago, a strange and unexpected meteor showers event happened because it brought both powers and death.

For some reason, after thousands of meteors that crashed upon the Earth infected and changed most lifeforms, turning them into more powerful and savage beasts, outnumbering and overpowering humanity with brute forces alone, their sizes, powers and strength far surpassed any weapons that humanity currently possesses, normal bullets won't even be able to make them feel any itch, explosives would only provokes them more than actually killing them, and their fangs alone are both stronger and sharper them any blades ever made.

But humanity is anything but fragile, from the meteors, each of the thousands contained a powerful artifact, a technology far surpassed anything and everything on Earth, it's an advance combat suit dubbed by many as the "God's Gear" that's allowed humanity to survive and eliminate the scourge of the Animals Apocalypse.

=======================================

God's Gear:

By wearing one, a normal human are able to kill a Beast with just a single hit, because it's amplified the wearer's physical conditions 1000 folds, making them more faster and hit harder than anything physically possible and that's just Level 1.

Made of highly advance nanotechnology, it is extremely tough, almost indestructible, capable of withstanding most powerful beasts attacks without even a scratch, and it is so advance that the suit can literally entered your body, hiding itself between your flesh and skins, other than providing enhanced physical abilities, it also provide energy shields, flight, and a HUD system upon activation, it absorb a small amount of the wearer's blood for security purposes, preventing others from stealing it.

God's Gear does indeed possessed and grants incredible abilities to the wearer's but the rest of the abilities are hidden behind levels, stages that the wearer's must achieve in order to unlock more abilities and powers, and they can do so by collecting points by killing Monstrous Animals, each species of Monster Animals offered different points, and each species have at least 10 different tiers of monsters.

To achieved just one level, you have to collect 100,000 points and once you've reached one level, you'll be rewarded with choosing one upgrades for the God's Gear, it could be by adding more features, improves your current one or gain new items and weapons.

The Technologies is so advance that the most brilliant minds on Earth thinks it is at least 50,000 years more advance than what humanity have currently.

======================================

Government:

With all these monsters running loose and terrorizing the public safety, the government open a program called "Anti Monster's Maintenence Organization" AKA A.M.M.O., they're willing to pay those who possessed God's Gear for each monsters they killed, the more powerful and dangerous the monsters, the more they'll get paid.

Oddly enough, the government's even have, offer, sell and reward those who perform incredibly with more otherworldly items, devices, weapons and and even transportations that either came with the meteors showers or with their own Earthly development, it can be bought by normal currency, whilst the Earth developed technologies copy of the alien tech is an inferior version of it, the use and potency of the technology is still very impressive and high by human standards.

Aside from slaying the Animal's Monsters, the government are also willing to pay top price for an unused and unclaimed God's Gear or any other alien tech that is yet to discovered, the price for a single God's Gear is at least 100 Billion US dollars, The price is varies in each countries but equal to that amount.

====
creator: HyperActive
